name: prompt-engineer
description: Design, optimize, test, and evaluate LLM prompts for effectiveness, consistency, and cost efficiency across zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, ReAct, and other patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Design, optimize, test, and evaluate LLM prompts for effectiveness, consistency, and cost efficiency across zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, ReAct, and other patterns.
interface.longDescription: Follow the requirements-analysis to production workflow to select a prompt pattern, reduce tokens, and evaluate variants before shipping.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Prompt Engineer safely.
